name: Dragon Slayer
description: Nihon Falcom action RPG series that helped define early Japanese computer RPG design and later branched into distinct subseries.

eras.title: Early Falcom Action RPG Era
eras.description: Dragon Slayer and its early numbered entries explore action RPG, dungeon, and platform RPG structures.

eras.title: Branching RPG Era
eras.description: The Dragon Slayer line expands into major branches such as Sorcerian and The Legend of Heroes.
